videos.headline: Florida hands Texas its second loss of the season
videos.description: Florida picks up its second win of the season as the Gators down Arch Manning and Texas at home.

videos.headline: Billy Napier relives Florida upset over No. 9 Texas
videos.description: Napier speaks on the Gators' difference makers and team chemistry after Florida takes down the Longhorns for the first time since 1940.
